_comment: Per-host source overrides for crawl-host-firecrawl.mjs. Without an entry a host defaults to its (legacy) pricing-source URL or basicInfo.websiteUrl — often a homepage, which is marketing fluff with no per-plan specs (see the failed fastcomet/hostpapa runs). Point each host at the DEEP shared/web-hosting plan-spec page that lists per-plan storage/sites/backups/features — the same kind of page that produced clean tmdhosting diffs. URLs below mirror the browser-verified scripts/pricing-urls.json. NOTE: hetzner/contabo/kamatera/ovhcloud are VPS/cloud-first; their shared-spec pages are thin, so the crawl yields low-value facts — run them last. Shape: "<hostId>": { "siteUrls": ["https://host.com/web-hosting"], "reputationUrl": "https://www.trustpilot.com/review/host.com" } (reputationUrl optional — derived from the domain if omitted).
